# cco

Nix package for `cco` ("Claude Condom"), a bubblewrap-based sandbox wrapper that confines Claude Code execution via `bwrap` + seccomp BPF filters. Linux-only; requires unprivileged user namespaces.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | `stdenv.mkDerivation` for `pname = "cco"`, `version = "0-unstable-2026-04-30"`; produces `$out/bin/cco` and `$out/bin/cco-sandbox` via `makeWrapper`. |

## Outputs

Two binaries built from `nikvdp/cco` rev `9744b9fce8f8db1deae20be4dfe430b7a05c2f53`:

- `$out/bin/cco` — wraps `share/cco/cco`; PATH-injects `bubblewrap git coreutils findutils gnused gnugrep gawk file procps docker`
- `$out/bin/cco-sandbox` — wraps `share/cco/sandbox`; PATH-injects `bubblewrap coreutils findutils file`
- `$out/share/cco/lib/` — runtime lib modules
- `$out/share/cco/seccomp/` — seccomp BPF filter files

Both binaries receive `CCO_INSTALLATION_DIR=$out/share/cco` via `makeWrapper`.

## Behavioral Contracts

- `platforms = lib.platforms.linux` — package refuses non-Linux
- `--suffix PATH` not `--set PATH` — preserves system `bubblewrap` precedence for AppArmor profile compatibility
- `bwrap` requires unprivileged user namespaces; "Permission denied" = missing kernel feature, not a Nix config issue

## File Relationships

Consumed by [overlay.nix](../../overlay.nix) and [flake.nix](../../flake.nix) alongside sibling packages under `pkgs/`. Follows same single-`default.nix` convention as [pkgs/example-package/](../example-package/).
